name: IHeaderButtonHandler
summary: This interface represents a handler for putting custom buttons on the header of IRhinoUiSection.

methods.name: ButtonDetails
methods.signature: bool ButtonDetails(int index, ref Bitmap iconOut, ref string sToolTipOut)
methods.summary: Implement this method to describe custom buttons on the section header. RDK calls this method continually increasing iIndex until it returns \e false

params.name: index
params.doc: index is the button index starting at zero and increasing with each call.

params.name: iconOut
params.doc: iconOut accepts the button's imagery, or 'icon'. If an icon is not required, do not set this parameter.

params.name: sToolTipOut
params.doc: sToolTipOut accepts the button's tool-tip. If a tool-tip is not required, do not set this parameter.

returns.doc: \e true if button is required, \e false to stop.

methods.name: ButtonRect
methods.summary: Implement this method to get the rectangle of a button on the header window.

params.name: index
params.doc: index is the index of the button.

params.name: rectHeader
params.doc: rectHeader is the usable area of the header where the buttons can be placed.

methods.name: OnButtonClicked
methods.summary: Implement this method to handle a button click.

params.name: index
params.doc: index is the index of the button that was clicked

returns.doc: \e true if handled successfully, else \e false.
